title: Wire collection backing storage (array_get/array_set)
body:
After matrix green: wire collection backing storage per platform-spec tier rules; replace count-only placeholders in foundation `Collections/*` (e.g. [`List.bd`](compiler/corelib/packages/foundation/src/Collections/List.bd)).

## Sequencing

**Blocked on** `corelib-matrix-green` (42/42) — do not parallelize with resolve/codegen waves.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
